title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Aliens Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Aliens Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aliens Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Sales Manager to strengthen our Ghaziabad-based team.

About Aliens Group:
Aliens Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aliens Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
